vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Mounting flange ISO 9409
CNC + LPBF manufacturing
IP67 sealed joints
NSF-compliant materials
Food-grade hygienic design
80-400mm per link, 600-1200mm reach
5kg payload, 600mm reach
10-40C ambient, IP54 environment
10k+ cycles, joint torque 5-50Nm

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat dissipation from harmonic drive.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling solutions such as fans or liquid cooling.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure strain relief clamps are used at all cable exits.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex fastener patterns.
risk.mit: Provide detailed assembly instructions and visual aids for assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of seal failure due to environmental stress.
risk.mit: Use high-quality seals and conduct regular inspections.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to insufficient rib reinforcement.
risk.mit: Increase rib thickness and perform stress analysis to ensure structural integrity.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.path: Base plate rotates around Z-axis, driving harmonic drive
Torque from arm segments is transmitted to base plate
Heat generated by harmonic drive is dissipated to base plate
Cooling air flows through cable entry grommet to cool electronic components
Sealed joints maintain IP67 rating against environmental ingress

adjacent_interfaces.assembly_order_hint: Install base plate first, then attach joint
Press fit harmonic drive into base plate

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Integrate leveling screws for precise floor alignment
Use strain relief clamps for cable management
Design removable hatch for periodic maintenance

verification_focus.focus: Torque transmission from harmonic drive to base plate
Heat dissipation from harmonic drive to base plate
Airflow through cable entry grommet for cooling

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC milling for Al 7075 body, LPBF for ribs and flanges

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CMM for critical dimensions, visual for surface finish

risk.desc: The design may require additional material to achieve the desired strength and durability for the industrial environment.
risk.mit: Conduct a material analysis and consider reinforcing critical areas with additional material or using a stronger alloy.

risk.desc: The thermal management design may not be sufficient to handle the heat generated by the electronics.
risk.mit: Review the thermal management strategy and consider adding more cooling features or improving the existing ones.

risk.mit: Optimize the design of the service cover to ensure easy access and clear visibility.

risk.mit: Review the mounting bracket design and ensure it can support the electronics in all required orientations.

risk.mit: Review the power_signal_separation design and ensure it meets the required standards.

integration_opportunities.description: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles, with the separation visible in routing geometry.
Each electronics module states its grounding scheme (star point, chassis bond, isolated) and signal returns route alongside their signals.
PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings, and mounting holes match standard board patterns.
